MOTION TO CONTINUE COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-16-2003 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-10-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-10-2003 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/M. Vallejo, CSR: Valerie Papale.
Appearances:
Nils Rosenquest, Esq. for plaintiff Adrienne Antonini
Michael Raifsnider, Esq. for defendant Geary Print Shop, Inc., Present by Anna Wong,
Parties met in the chambers and reached a settlement by stipulation,read into the record as follows: parties stipulated to a settlement order, defendant ows $10,000.00 back rent from February to June, 2003. $2,000.00 paid today, balance of $8,000.00 due to landlord by or on before july 1, 2003. Parties stipulated that July's rent is due on July 15, 2003, with $2,000.00 rent/security deposit credit to be determined at a latter date. Defendant agreed to vacate the premises on or before August 1, 2003. Plaintiff waives interest on past due rent, each side to bear their own costs and attorneys fees. Judgment for possession to be entered if defendant defaults by ex-parte application, on 24 hours notice to counsel. If defendant comply case to be dismissed with prejudice, Parties agreed to terms, plaintiff's counsel to reduced to writting as to form for signature. Trial date is vacated.

DEMURRER
Off Calendar Apr-11-2003 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Michael J. Raifsnider, Esq., 398-9001, for defendant Geary Print Shop, Inc., demurring party
Nils Rosenquest, Esq. of ROSENQUEST & ASSOCIATES 292-0980, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court adopted its tentative ruling -- DEFENDANT GEARY PRINT SHOP, INC.'s DEMURRER -- Overruled, 5 days leave to answer. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. (DAG/301/SL) Reporter: Joe Vickstein, CSR 4780
